decision.summary: CHANGED (second-opinion morning pass, ~50 min before close) — S4 Carcassonne→Foix break day: ONE swap Castrillo→Cort (dead slot → 5th of the research board 7 own-the-break names; +~60k stage EV for a 44k fee, breadth +1 top-15 candidate). Captain UNCHANGED Mathias Vacek: RP 11/1 best owned (Van Gils/Gregoire/Cort all 20/1), Axelgaard 5-star top pick, tied-top owned capCeil. Considered and REJECTED: buying favourite Pedersen 11/4 (9.55M unaffordable without selling live break assets — needs 2-3 sells), MvdP 10.9M (same), captain flip to Van Gils (EV-board quirk contradicted by the actual market). Team stays 2-max per squad, bank ~1.0M after.

swaps.rationale: Second-opinion morning upgrade: Castrillo is zero-signal today AND tomorrow (capCeil 2k, conf 0, S5 0.001, e_horizon 3k) while Cort is the 3rd-strongest S4 asset in the pool (capCeil 62k, conf 0.86, e_horizon 109k), 20/1 with the bookies (same tier as owned Van Gils/Gregoire), on the research own-the-break-board list, and a serial TdF break winner — Foix is a break-finish town. One legal swap: Uno-X goes to 2/2 (Charmig+Cort), bank 1.52M+3.958M covers 4.434M+1% fee with ~1.0M left.

2026-07-06T19:06Z CHANGED (evening, S4 Carcassonne→Foix, hilly/break day) — **captain flip + 1 swap**. Live team = prior S3 plan (converge applied it, 0 drift). CAPTAIN Pogačar→**Vacek**: break-structured stage (last climb crests ~35km out, long rolling run-in, ~60/40 break lean all 3 panels) collapses Pogačar's stage ceiling to capCeil 12.6k; Vacek is highest owned capCeil 69.7k (conf 0.86, p15 0.51), the cyclinguptodate OFFICIAL pick + Axelgaard ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Captaincy free → captain the ceiling. SWAP sell **Alex Baudin** (EF, floored e_h 3.3k/conf 0, no S4 signal; KOM jersey short-lived on a non-climber) → buy **Maxim Van Gils** (Red Bull, e_h 115k/capCeil 65k/conf 0.78, p15 0.49) — pool's 2nd-highest break ceiling, glaring prior omission; +112k e_h for ~65k fee. Funded: frees 5.52M+1.88M bank, buy 6.51M+65k, leftover 0.83M. Target8: Pogacar/Vacek/VanGils/Gregoire/Healy/Charmig/Castrillo/Barguil = 4 real break contenders (p15 0.19–0.51 ≈ enriched breadth 4.1) + Pogačar GC/yellow anchor (125k/day passive, don't churn maillot jaune) + 3 cheap climber tickets hedging S6 Tourmalet. All teams ≤1/2, 8 riders. DEFENSIVE: 0 owned isOut/isOutUnconfirmed (De Lie abandon + INEOS crash NOT owned). Skipped marginal Hermans/Cort/Abrahamsen upgrades (net ~+4k after 1% fee) per anti-churn + budget-margin. NB S5 tomorrow = flat sprint → reshape for sprinters next evening; keep climbers for S6 Tourmalet. matchRate 0.197.

2026-07-05T19:09Z CHANGED — **profile-block reshape S1-TTT-team → S3-mountain/break-team** (7 sells / 7 buys). Live team was still the TTT-8 (plan==live, 0 drift); the TTT scored and 7 of 8 owned riders are TT domestiques with e_h~3.3k / conf 0 (no stage-3 signal). Upcoming = Stage 3 (Granollers→Les Angles, ~4,000m, "Pyrenées Light", NO summit finish, block_boundary:true, leverage 0.78) = break-vs-GC-group coin flip, slight break lean. Reshaped to breakaway-breadth where EV + research AGREE: Grégoire (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐, e_h142k) + Healy (⭐⭐⭐⭐, e_h89k @ conf0.83) + Vacek(88k/4.05M) + Baudin(60k, EF 2-up = most-likely break winner) + Barguil(37k/3.0M,conf0.69) + Charmig(31k) + Castrillo(31k). SELLS: Kwiatkowski, Campenaerts, Cattaneo, Foss, Jorgenson, Tratnik, Wellens. Captain **Pogačar** HELD — pool-top capCeil 84k runaway, best floor in both scenarios (bonus-second hunter, wins a reduced GC sprint), GC#2 +6" retains a GC anchor; early-tour accumulate → captain the chalk not the Grégoire differential (capCeil 79k). Team 49.76M≤50M, EF 2-up, others ≤1/team, 8 riders, 0 isOut in pool. 7 buys×1% ≈326k fee ≪ Σe_h uplift ~150k→~630k and riders carry into S4 hilly. matchRate 0.201 (LOW but front-of-race names ARE odds-covered; floored TT riders = genuine no-signal). Teardown guard OK (source=llm-routine is TRUSTED). NB: no 2nd GC man for passive income — re-add before the S6 Tourmalet block where the break is less likely to be let go.

Final startlist (cyclingstage.com, updated 3 Jul): Netcompany INEOS = Bernal, Arensman, Foss, Ganna, Godon, Kwiatkowski, Tarling, Vauquelin — no Rodríguez; holdet players API flags personId 4298 isOut:true (one of 22 non-starters, 184 active = 23×8). The Jul-2 hard-sell was CORRECT in hindsight. **Standing instruction: NEVER rebuy Carlos Rodríguez this tour**, regardless of pool re-appearance or isOut flapping — the "FREE pre-stage-1 upgrade IF he re-appears" idea from the 20:05 entry is retracted.

findings.detail: Captain miss on 32% of stages (avg 27024 kr left; worst: flat (avg regret 42619)). Tighten captain selection on flat stages.

improve.mergeGateExplanation: Held (not merged): the conjunctive gate (in-sample ≥ MIN AND held-out ≥ MIN AND no fold regresses) was not met — held-out is -0.23% (must be positive / above floor); at least one cross-val fold regressed; no change proposed.

strategy.essence: Maximise total team VALUE GROWTH (kr) over the whole Tour. Strategy is EV TENDENCIES, not hard rules/quotas: build the squad by maximising Σ e_horizon under the constraints (8 riders, 50M budget, max 2 per real team, 1 captain), use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership among near-equal e_horizon, and captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling. GOLD = unlimited swaps; the only friction is the 1% buy fee, so only swap when the multi-stage gain beats it. Confidence governs aggression — discount low-confidence riders.
tendencies: Maximise Σ e_horizon under the hard constraints; do not churn for sub-1%-fee gains.
Use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots so under-priced value is not overlooked.
Among near-equal e_horizon, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership.
Captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling (right-tail upside).
Concentrate variance/captaincy where stage leverage is high; prefer breadth on low-confidence stages.
Discount enriched.lowConfidence riders and fused.confidence < 0.4; matchRate governs how much to trust EV.
Respect profile_block / block_boundary look-ahead: do not dump a rider wanted again 1–3 stages later.
On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/etapebonus do not apply — value whole strong TT squads.

glossary.definition: Expected value in kr from THIS stage for a rider — Σ over placement, GC, jersey, sprint/KOM, TTT terms, minus hazard. Same kr axis the backtest scores.
Multi-stage expectation: e_stage plus discounted, hold-weighted look-ahead over the next 1–3 stages, net of the amortized 1% buy fee. The primary team-build objective.
e_horizon (net of amortized fee) per 1M kr of price — the efficiency metric for filling cheap breadth slots. Infinity if value is 0 with positive EV.
High/med/low tercile bucket of roi_per_million across the live (non-DNS) field — a quick-read value tag.
E[max(0, Δkr)] right-tail if this rider is captained this stage — the win windfall + placement upside + positive passive floor. Captain the owned rider with the highest one.
Fused stage-win probability (de-vigged odds + star/UCI/feltet signals via a weighted geometric pool), normalised so the board ~sums to 1.
Fused probability of finishing in the stage top-15 (p_stage expanded by a per-stage-type exponent). Drives etapebonus breadth.
Fused GC-strength: de-vigged GC win odds blended with a capped UCI-points prior. Paid every held stage as passive GC income.
HONEST 0–1 trust band = coverage × agreement (NOT a statistical interval). Below 0.4 the rider is flagged low-confidence; discount aggression.
Count of independent research channels that had a reading for this rider (0–5). More channels = sturdier fusion.
Fraction of the pool a LIVE source actually covered. Low pre-race (only GC odds live); rises ~24h out. Low matchRate = treat EV as weak.
Per-stage 0–1 decisive-stage weight (GC importance, volatility, summit, TT). Concentrate variance/captaincy where it is high.
Expected count of an optimal 8-man team’s riders inside the stage top-15. High on bunch days, low on selective mountain/TT days.
Grouping of consecutive similar stages + whether this stage closes the block — the 1–3 stage anti-churn look-ahead.
Holdbonus = real-team stage-finish spillover to all that team’s active riders. On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/late-arrival/etapebonus do NOT apply — value whole strong TT squads.
True when the dashboard successfully re-ran the pure fusion+EV engine to reconstruct per-rider numbers; false means it fell back to the snapshot name-lists.
